div.head: The Ambassador in Bolivia (Boal) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
911. Substance of Department’s 718 and 719 of October 8Neither printed; in these telegrams the Department transmitted suggestions of changes that the Export-Import Bank wished the Bolivian Congress to consider (824.50/173, 174). given to Minister of National Economy this morning. He expressed the
opinion that no difficulties would be encountered in incorporating the Export-Import Bank’s suggestions in Chamber’s resolution of approval. By coincidence while I was with him, he was called to come to the Chamber immediately as the Development Corporation was then under discussion in secret session.
I now feel more hopeful regarding speedy action on the matter.
